audit_items.proof_trace: Memory allocated at line 27 (`new size_t[L+1]`) is not freed on early return path at line 32 when any input vector is empty. Normal execution path properly frees memory at line 67, but early return bypasses cleanup.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Call permutate() with input containing at least one empty vector (e.g., `{{1,2}, {}, {3,4}}`). Function allocates memory then immediately returns without cleanup, causing memory leak.
